{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/255289628?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/princeeismond-dot", "id": 255289628, "login": "princeeismond-dot", "node_id": "U_kgDODzdpHA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/princeeismond-dot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32019", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary
`isPrivateIpv4()` in bundled SSRF guard code missed several IPv4 special-use/non-global ranges, so `web_fetch` could allow targets that should be blocked by SSRF policy.

### Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published affected version: `2026.2.21-2` (published 2026-02-21)
- Structured vulnerable range: `<= 2026.2.21-2`
- Planned patched version (pre-set): `>= 2026.2.22`

### Impact
Low severity. Exploitation requires network reachability to the relevant special-use ranges and a request path that reaches `web_fetch` URL fetching.

### Technical Details
Affected releases used narrow IPv4 private-range checks that omitted multiple RFC special-use/non-global ranges. This allowed requests such as `http://198.18.0.1/...` through SSRF validation in affected releases. Follow-up hardening consolidates local-host/tailnet range checks so gateway/browser/tailnet paths share one canonical IP classification flow.

### Fix Commit(s)
- `71bd15bb4294d3d1b54386064d69cd0f5f731bd8`
- `44dfbd23df453e51b71ef79a148c28c53e89168c`
- `333fbb86347998526dd514290adfd5f727caa6d9`
- `f14ebd743cfc73f667fae80af70043d0ab1f88bd`

OpenClaw thanks @princeeismond-dot for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00206, "percentile": 0.10658}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-04T19:03:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32019"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-19T22:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-03-04T19:03:45Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/333fbb86347998526dd514290adfd5f727caa6d9", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/44dfbd23df453e51b71ef79a148c28c53e89168c", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/71bd15bb4294d3d1b54386064d69cd0f5f731bd8", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/f14ebd743cfc73f667fae80af70043d0ab1f88bd", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32019", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-incomplete-ipv4-special-use-range-blocking-in-ssrf-guard", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw has incomplete IPv4 special-use SSRF blocking in web fetch guard", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:59:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rqq-w8v4-7p47", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.2.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.2.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw has incomplete IPv4 special-use SSRF blocking in web fetch guard
